paper.title: Electronic and Optical Properties of Two-Dimensional GaN from First-Principles
paper.authors: Bayerl, Islam, Jones, Protasenko, Jena, Kioupakis

bilayer.gap_status: PBE bilayer is metallic (gap closed by inter-layer band overlap); paper used LDA+gw which preserves a small gap
bilayer.note: Force convergence achieved on uicgpu (QE7.4.1 GPU); 24x24 nscf + IPA dielectric computed; PBE gap closure is a documented functional artifact for this 2D bilayer system

not_replicated: GW quasiparticle corrections (requires BerkeleyGW or yambo G0W0)
LDA functional run for direct paper comparison

verdict: DFT structural relaxation (force < 0.001 Ry/Bohr) achieved for both monolayer and bilayer. PBE bilayer band gap collapses to metallic regime (vs paper LDA gap 1.32 eV) - known functional sensitivity. IPA dielectric function computed for bilayer.
